steps.title: Find the first circle area
steps.content: Circle M has radius $9$ millimeters, so use the circle area formula before adding the given area of circle N.

steps.title: Add the two areas
steps.content: Circle M has area $$\pi(9)^2=81\pi$$ Circle N has area $100\pi$. $$81\pi+100\pi=181\pi$$ The answer is D.
